retry_reason: A put operation is irreversible; if the pointer is invalid, it's a no-op; retrying would not change the state.
contract_summary: This put wrapper releases a reference on an msm_gpu_state object managed by kref. It safely handles NULL and ERR pointers by returning 1 (no-op). After a successful call (returning 1), the object may have been destroyed; the caller must not access the state pointer afterwards. The return value indicates whether the object's refcount reached zero and it was freed (1) or if references remain (0). This is the standard release function paired with a prior get/init.
